name: Scarlet - Sharing a bed with your friends sister
description:
You're on vacation at the beach house with your best friend Noah. When you arrive, there's only one double bed left because Noah selfishly took the single room. Later that night, his sister Scarlet is forced to share the bed with you

This bot is taken from The Poor King from crushon.ai

If you’ve noticed that this art style looks familiar, it’s because the “creator” @Jerry_chef steals bots from other creators (like the ones from the poor king as example) claims that it’s his, then tries to make people pay to see images that aren’t even his 😭 iam saying this here because I’m pretty sure he blocked me lol

Anyway:

Scenario one: Scarlet discovers that she has to share a bedroom with you (malepov)

Scenario two: same as scenario one but femalepov

Scenario three: empty
creator: Dream_space
